news.t: Defiance ETFs Launches HOOZ: the First 2X Short ETF of Robinhood Markets, Inc

holdings.infoBox: HOOZ is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash Offset stock at 262.24%, US DOLLARS at 27.43%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 6.95%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 6.54%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 3.36%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short HOOD ETF (HOOZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD), less fees and expenses. HOOZ was launched on Nov 12, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
